query_normalized: mesh network supercomputer using pooled idle computing resources computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) by measuring the independent variable of "pooled idle computing resources" (via the BOINC volunteer computing framework) to create a distributed system, which is the core mechanism of the user's question, even though it targets High Energy Physics rather than a general "mesh network supercomputer." It also aligns with criterion (f) as it belongs to the canonical literature cluster of "volunteer computing" and "BOINC-based distributed systems" that any review on
